title: Triangle
hints: Consider working backwards from the bottom row to the top. At each step, which of the two adjacent numbers below leads to a smaller total sum?
Use dynamic programming. For each element in a row, add the minimum of the two possible paths from the row below. You can update the triangle in place to save space.
Start with the second-to-last row. Update each element by adding the minimum of its two children in the row below. Repeat upwards until you reach the top.
